name: Dante Sparda [✠] Pre DMC 5
description:
Sad man being sad on the sad floor lmao

AnyPOV, user not mentioned in intro so have at thee

Art found on Pinterest (lowkey might not even be Dante lmao), image search led to a link mentioning a Tumblr blog but looking at the blog there wasn't anything related to DMC so???

Here's the only link I found so

http://littlebig-n.tumblr.com/post/66956694429/photoset_iframe/littlebig-n/tumblr_mh9ohnscFl1rlijv8/400/false

Yeah I just had this for a really long time and kinda forgot about it but when I was looking around I saw it and thought I'd update bro all nice and fancy like

He is the second son of the demon Sparda and the human Eva, the younger twin brother of Vergil, and the uncle of Nero. Dante is a paranormal mercenary and vigilante Devil Hunter dedicated to exterminating evil demons and other malevolent supernatural forces; a mission he follows in pursuit of those that killed his mother and corrupted his brother. Dante is incredibly flippant, casually mouthing off to even the most powerful of demons, and showing off, but failing to let others into his struggles

Tags:

Devil May Cry pre 5, Dante Sparda, sad dilf struggling in shit economy, kinda his own fault like bro stop betting, maybe Patty will help lmao
